backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a public query function for HTTP outcall transformation, delegating to the OutCall module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: multi-page routing fixes and WhatsApp phone number update to 7096912557.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing component purposes, routing setup, and integration details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including custom design tokens for the Veda Healar brand.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with six routes (home, about, services, book, testimonials, contact) wrapped in a Layout component with Navbar, Footer, and WhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/AboutIntro.tsx: About introduction section with mission statement, three value cards (Authentic Practice, Personalized Guidance, Proven Results), and scroll reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Booking form component with validation that submits appointment data to Google Apps Script endpoint, handling form state, errors, and success/error notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand info, contact details including WhatsApp link to 7096912557, TanStack Router navigation links, social media icons, disclaimer, and Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section component with cosmic background, mandala overlay, headline text, and CTA buttons for booking and exploring services. Includes animated scroll indicator at bottom.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menus, scroll-based styling, and active route highlighting. Includes mobile hamburger menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/PaymentPlacehold: Placeholder component displaying payment information and accepted payment methods (Razorpay, Stripe, UPI, Bank Transfer). Includes commented structure for future payment integration.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable service card component with icon, name, description, price, and booking link. Features scroll-reveal animation with configurable delay.
frontend/src/components/ServicesOverview: Services overview section displaying a grid of service cards (numerology, name correction, reiki, etc.) with scroll animations and a link to view all services.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSlid: Auto-rotating testimonials carousel with manual navigation arrows, star ratings, and mandala background overlay. Displays client feedback with 5-second auto-advance.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp contact button in bottom-right corner with pre-filled message, pulse animation, and hover effects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook for managing backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication. Handles anonymous and authenticated actors, invalidates dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Reserved file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend canister; currently contains only commented example structure as booking submits directly to Google Sheets.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom React hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when elements enter viewport and trigger reveal animations, with configurable threshold and root margin.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes, defining color palette (beige, deep blue, gold accent), typography (Playfair Display, Inter), scroll reveal animations, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for React Query and ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page describing Veda Healar's mission to bridge Vedic wisdom with modern spiritual guidance, featuring scroll-reveal sections for story, mission, and guiding principles with icons.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Consultation booking page with BookingForm component, payment placeholder, and success confirmation state showing submission acknowledgment and next steps.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying location, WhatsApp, email, business hours, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and a call-to-action to book consultations.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page composing HeroSection, ServicesOverview, AboutIntro, and TestimonialsSlider components into the main landing page layout.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page component displaying a grid of 5 spiritual services (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, Reiki, business name analysis) with hero section, service cards with scroll reveal animations, and CTA section linking to booking.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page component showing 6 client reviews in a grid layout with star ratings, quote icons, scroll reveal animations, and a CTA section linking to the booking page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Veda Healar color palette (deepBlue, goldAccent, beigeBackground), shadcn UI design tokens with OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Playfair Display serif, Inter sans), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Veda Healar spiritual website features, architectural notes about React implementation, known multi-page routing issue, and completed features including multi-page structure, cosmic design theme, services, booking form, and WhatsApp integration.
